chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-541 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2237/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate, holds brief for Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner, and submits that the latter is busy before another bench of this Court. However, under instructions, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with the pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
